notes: River-crossing specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind. Its exclusive production building fields a vehicle that fords rivers directly without needing a crossing built, plus a ship capable of hunting other ships; a shared infantry-training building gives it its own foot-soldier roster too. Its specialty defense is a water-cannon turret that must sit next to the river to actually cover the crossing, since ships could otherwise sail past unchallenged. Gets a modest boost to its water-adjacent food production.
